taskTitle: Study the meaning and conditions of La ilaha illAllah
subtaskTitle: Review Quranic ayat that establish Tawhid (e.g., 112:1-4, 2:255)
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Review Quranic ayat that establish Tawhid (e.g., 112:1-4, 2:255)' under the parent task 'Study the meaning and conditions of La ilaha illAllah' (module: faith_shahada_core), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: Retrieve primary Quranic verses (Arabic and English) that directly or contextually establish: Review Quranic ayat that establish Tawhid (e.g., 112:1-4, 2:255)
Retrieve Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) with grade that directly or contextually establish: Review Quranic ayat that establish Tawhid (e.g., 112:1-4, 2:255)
